description_long: This is a large, ornate wrought iron gate composed of three main sections: two central swinging panels and a smaller side gate. The design features intricate scrollwork, decorative finials, and symmetrical patterns throughout the upper and lower portions. The central panels are slightly arched at the top, with pointed finials forming a gentle crest, while the side gate mirrors the decorative motifs of the main sections. The frame and vertical bars are robust, suggesting durability and security, and the entire structure is supported by thick posts at each end. The gate is predominantly black, with a glossy finish that highlights the elaborate metalwork. This type of gate is commonly found at the entrance to upscale residential driveways, estates, or private urban properties.
description: A large, ornate black wrought iron gate with intricate scrollwork, pointed finials, and three main sections, including a smaller side gate. The design is decorative and robust, suitable for upscale driveways or estate entrances.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative scrollwork, three sections, and the arched central panels with pointed finials.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the gate and the depth of the supporting posts, with minimal decorative detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same ornate patterns and structural layout of the gate.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim structure and the robust vertical posts.
